patch.value: Make pm a universal PM tool: schema list/show/remove, custom statuses, per-type workflows, project archetype presets
Make pm a universal PM tool: schema list/show/remove, custom statuses, per-type workflows, project archetype presets
Any project archetype (agile/ops/research) models its domain natively
Any project archetype can model its domain end-to-end with schema add/remove type, custom statuses, per-type workflows, and config keys without code changes; plan pm-z5nb completed.

## Charter
Living capability epic for schema, config, and universal customization — the "any kind of project" pillar: custom item types/statuses/fields, per-type workflows, governance presets, project profiles/archetypes, and pm config keys.

## Scope
- In: pm schema family (add/remove-type, add/remove-status, add-field), per-type allowed-transitions, governance settings, profile apply (pm-kanban exemplar), init type-presets, config set key surface.
- Out: extension-registered types' runtime loading (pm-ugqx), settings-file write concurrency (pm-bgcu under pm-dj98).

## Status
23 closed children (schema epic completion plan pm-z5nb largely delivered: remove-type, add-status, per-type workflows, create_default_type; profiles PR#362/364; kanban archetype PR#367). Open children:
- pm-28cf — search config normalization GH-244 follow-up (empty provider/adapter strings should auto-normalize).
- pm-z5nb — completion Plan retained open as the epic's verification checklist; close after confirming every referenced child is closed and documented.
